creator: rleigh@codelibre.net
text: The issue with Boost.Context and CMake is due to the 1.68 beta missing boost/context/all.hpp.  I've asked on the Boost list to clarify if it's a regression or deliberate.  If the latter, I can work around this in FindBoost.  If the former, should hopefully be fixed for the 1.68 final release.
